scripts.build: bun run build:relations && bun run build:ontology && bun run build:ui && bun scripts/build-manifests.mjs
scripts.rebuild:all: bun run sources:download && bun run build:data && bun run build
scripts.check: bun run check:relations && bun scripts/build-manifests.mjs --check && bun scripts/build-ontology.mjs --check && bun scripts/check-ui-artifacts.mjs
scripts.verify: bun run build && bun run validate && bun run validate:ontology && bun run validate:shacl && bun run validate:sparql && bun run check:content && bun test && bun run check
scripts.verify:official: bun run sources:check && bun run verify
